testcase.name: testMultiply
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <6> but was: <5> at com.example.SimpleTest.testMultiply(SimpleTest.java:42) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.junit.platform.commons.util.ReflectionUtils.invokeMethod(ReflectionUtils.java:728) at org.junit.jupiter.engine.execution.MethodInvocation.proceed(MethodInvocation.java:60)
